name: teak
description: Modern dockerized web application with Hono.js and React
author: praveenjuge <hello@praveenjuge.com>

scripts.build: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.build:backend: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && bun build backend/src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun
scripts.build:frontend: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd apps/web && bun run build
scripts.dev:frontend: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd apps/web && bun run dev
scripts.db:generate: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd backend && bunx drizzle-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd backend && bunx drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.db:push: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd backend && bunx drizzle-kit push
scripts.db:studio: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd backend && bunx drizzle-kit studio
scripts.db:seed: source ./scripts/use-node-20.sh && cd backend && bun run src/seeds/cards.ts
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd apps/web && bun install && cd .. && cd mobile && bun install
